title: The Sadri
content:
The largest and most famous of the Panneri moorings, the Sadri is a vast collection of stations, outposts, and even some of the few permanent Panneri settlements. It spans the entirety of the system known to the rest of the galaxy as "Moorpoint". It is considered a cardinal sin for blood to be shed within the bounds of the Sadri, and as such, all manners of personal weaponry is forbidden, and ships must physically disconnect their weapons systems upon entering. All Panneri caravans are required by their religion to return to the Sadri once a year (Bantaru Standardized Calendar, or every 0.89 Galactic Standard Years). It is this single tenant that kept the Panneri restricted to their corner of space for thousands of years, as no caravan could be half a year's travel away from the Sadri.

Many scholars, Panneri or otherwise, believe Moorpoint to be the home system of the Panneri, though if any evidence of their original civilization exists on any of the planets within the Sadri, it has long since been lost to time.
